summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Medicals and Agencies entities. All 31 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed sidebar navigation, list views, detail modals, notes, and mark contacted functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor eslint warnings in Medicals.jsx and Agencies.jsx about missing useEffect dependencies - cosmetic only
seed_data_creation: None - used existing MED-0001 and AGY-0001 records
context_for_next_testing_agent: Medicals and Agencies CRUD fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_medicals_agencies.py cover: create, read, update, delete, notes CRUD, mark contacted, tasks for medicals/agencies, auto-generated codes (MED-XXXX, AGY-XXXX). Frontend verified: sidebar navigation, list views with search/filter, detail modals with notes/tasks sections, mark contacted toast notifications.

medicals.crud_create: PASS - API creates medical with MED-XXXX code
medicals.crud_read: PASS - List and single GET work with search/filter
medicals.crud_update: PASS - Updates name, status, priority correctly
medicals.crud_delete: PASS - Deletes medical and related notes
medicals.notes_add: PASS - Notes added with created_by and timestamp
medicals.notes_view: PASS - Notes displayed in detail modal
medicals.mark_contacted: PASS - Sets last_contact_date and follow_up_date (25 days)

agencies.crud_create: PASS - API creates agency with AGY-XXXX code
agencies.crud_read: PASS - List and single GET work with search/filter
agencies.crud_update: PASS - Updates name, status, priority correctly
agencies.crud_delete: PASS - Deletes agency and related notes
agencies.notes_add: PASS - Notes added with created_by and timestamp
agencies.notes_view: PASS - Notes displayed in detail modal
agencies.mark_contacted: PASS - Sets last_contact_date and follow_up_date (25 days)

frontend_pages.medicals_page: PASS - Renders with search, filter, add button
frontend_pages.agencies_page: PASS - Renders with search, filter, add button
frontend_pages.detail_modals: PASS - Shows all fields, notes, tasks sections
